productDisplayName: Murcia Women Shiny Textured Maroon Handbag
description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its blended upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsBlended upper One main compartment with two zipped pockets and a mobile pouch Two short glossy handles woven through metallic loopsZipped pocket on the back Two zipped pockets on the sidesTextured shimmery fabric for styleMaterial and CareBlendedWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 32 cmWidth: 30 cm
